option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Mobile Final Project
## Map-based order tracking
This project now includes a map-first delivery finder experience in `DriverFinderFragment`.
### Implemented features - Order pickup/drop-off points rendered on an interactive map - Device geolocation with runtime permission handling - A distinct current-location indicator - Marker selection opens a delivery detail bottom sheet - Lightweight clustering behavior for dense map areas - Customer dashboard with order counters and quick actions - Customer My Orders list with status filtering - Customer New Order flow with address/date/time/description/budget validation - Places autocomplete support with manual-address fallback when no Maps API key is set - Unit + instrumentation test coverage for map behavior and customer data flow
## Verified commands
```bash cd /home/razbro/Repos/mobile-final-project ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug --no-daemon ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon ./gradlew :app:assembleAndroidTest --no-daemon ```
## Notes - Instrumentation tests compile successfully in this environment. - Running them on-device requires Android platform tooling and a connected emulator/device.
### Optional on-device instrumentation run
```bash cd /home/razbro/Repos/mobile-final-project ./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest --no-daemon ```

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<<<<<<< HEAD <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" /> ======= <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" /> >>>>>>> 9ee08d12457e62b43cd641766869fea927e29541
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.MobileFinalProject">
<!-- Google Places API Key --> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="${MAPS_API_KEY}" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.MobileFinalProject">
<!-- Google Places API Key --> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="${MAPS_API_KEY}" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.mobilefinalproject.models
import android.net.Uri import java.io.Serializable import java.util.Date
data class Delivery( val id: String, val customerName: String, val customerId: String, val status: String, val price: Double, val date: Date, <<<<<<< HEAD val pickupAddress: String, val dropoffAddress: String, val phoneNumber: String, val rating: Int, val pickupLat: Double = 0.0, val pickupLng: Double = 0.0, val dropoffLat: Double = 0.0, val dropoffLng: Double = 0.0, ) ======= val pickupLocation: Location, val destinationLocation: Location, val description: String = "", val imageUri: Uri? = null, ) : Serializable >>>>>>> 9ee08d12457e62b43cd641766869fea927e29541

updatedContent

updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#2E7D32" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#C62828" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#FF9800" /> <corners android:radius="20dp" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Home" android:textSize="24sp" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_title_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_subtitle_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="13sp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_200" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_pending" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_pending_count_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_200" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_active" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/customer_home_active_count_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_home_new_order_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_create_order" android:textColor="@color/white" app:backgroundTint="@color/teal_700" app:cornerRadius="10dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/customer_home_my_orders_button" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_view_orders" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" app:cornerRadius="10dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/white" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Drag handle --> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:background="#DDDDDD" />
<!-- Header row: title + close --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_order_id" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Order #—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_status_badge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:paddingVertical="3dp" android:text="Pending" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:background="@drawable/bg_status_badge" /> </LinearLayout>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btn_close_sheet" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="Close" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="@color/black" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:background="#EEEEEE" />
<!-- Customer info --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Customer" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_customer_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Phone --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="8dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Phone" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_phone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Price --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="8dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Price" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_price" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="#2E7D32" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Pickup address --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="12dp">
<!-- Green dot --> <TextView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dot_green" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="PICKUP" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="10sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_pickup_address" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Drop-off address --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="10dp">
<!-- Red dot --> <TextView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_dot_red" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="DROP-OFF" android:textColor="#888888" android:textSize="10sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_dropoff_address" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="—" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/white" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@color/white" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Delivery Finder" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Find new delivery jobs" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/finder_deliveries_open_map_button" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Open Map" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_map" app:iconTint="@color/black" app:strokeColor="@color/black" app:strokeWidth="1dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<<<<<<< HEAD <!-- Location permission denied banner (shown at bottom) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/location_denied_banner" ======= </LinearLayout>
<!-- Deliveries List RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/driver_finder_deliveries_recycler_view" >>>>>>> 9ee08d12457e62b43cd641766869fea927e29541 </LinearLayout>
<!-- Deliveries List RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/finder_deliveries_recycler_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Full-screen map --> <org.osmdroid.views.MapView android:id="@+id/map_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:clickable="true" />
<!-- Header card overlaid at the top --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/delivery_finder_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/delivery_finder_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_my_location" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/my_location" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_mylocation" app:iconTint="@color/black" app:strokeColor="@color/black" app:strokeWidth="1dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Location permission denied banner (shown at bottom) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/location_denied_banner" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:visibility="gone" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFF3CD" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/location_permission_denied_banner" android:textColor="#856404" android:textSize="13sp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btn_dismiss_banner" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/dismiss" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="#856404" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <!-- <string name="app_name">MobileFinalProject</string>--> <!-- <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string>--> <!-- <string name="login_subtitle">Login to continue</string>--> <!-- <string name="driver">Driver</string>--> <!-- <string name="customer">Customer</string>--> <!-- <string name="id_number">ID Number</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_your_id">Enter your ID</string>--> <!-- <string name="password">Password</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_phone_number">555-0123</string>--> <!-- <string name="login">Login</string>--> <!-- <string name="no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string>--> <!-- <string name="register">Register</string>--> <!-- <string name="register_title">Join TruckBack</string>--> <!-- <string name="register_subtitle">Create your account</string>--> <!-- <string name="full_name">Full Name</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_your_name">Enter your name</string>--> <!-- <string name="email_optional">Email (Optional)</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_email">your@email.com</string>--> <!-- <string name="create_account">Create Account</string>--> <!-- <string name="already_have_account">Already have an account?</string>--> <string name="my_orders_title">My Orders</string> <string name="my_orders_subtitle">Go over your pending orders</string> <string name="filters_label">Filter Orders:</string> <string name="sample_customer_name">Emily Davis</string> <string name="sample_price">$21.25</string> <string name="sample_status_pending">Pending</string> <string name="sample_date_time">2025-12-27 | 10:00</string> <string name="from_label">From</string> <string name="to_label">To</string> <string name="sample_pickup_address">555 Maple Dr, North</string> <string name="sample_destination_address">888 Cedar Ln, South</string> <string name="load_image">Load Image</string> <string name="active_delivery_customer_label">Customer Name</string> <string name="active_delivery_separator">|</string> <string name="active_delivery_status_label">Status</string> <string name="active_delivery_pickup_label">Pickup</string> <string name="active_delivery_pickup_time_format">%1$s • %2$s</string> <string name="active_delivery_address_time_label">Address | Time</string> <string name="active_delivery_destination_label">Destination</string> <string name="active_delivery_address_label">Address</string> <string name="active_delivery_location_icon_pickup"></string> <string name="active_delivery_location_icon_destination"></string> <string-array name="customer_order_status_filter_options"> <item>All</item> <item>Pending</item> <item>Accepted</item> <item>In Progress</item> <item>Completed</item> </string-array> <string name="finder_sample_customer_name">Emily Davis</string> <string name="finder_sample_price">$21.25</string> <string name="finder_sample_time">2025-12-27 • 10:00</string> <string name="finder_sample_pickup_address">555 Maple Dr, North</string> <string name="finder_sample_destination_address">888 Cedar Ln, South</string> <string name="delivery_image">Delivery Image</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <!-- <string name="app_name">MobileFinalProject</string>--> <!-- <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string>--> <!-- <string name="login_subtitle">Login to continue</string>--> <!-- <string name="driver">Driver</string>--> <!-- <string name="customer">Customer</string>--> <!-- <string name="id_number">ID Number</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_your_id">Enter your ID</string>--> <!-- <string name="password">Password</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_phone_number">555-0123</string>--> <!-- <string name="login">Login</string>--> <!-- <string name="no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string>--> <!-- <string name="register">Register</string>--> <!-- <string name="register_title">Join TruckBack</string>--> <!-- <string name="register_subtitle">Create your account</string>--> <!-- <string name="full_name">Full Name</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_your_name">Enter your name</string>--> <!-- <string name="email_optional">Email (Optional)</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_email">your@email.com</string>--> <!-- <string name="create_account">Create Account</string>--> <!-- <string name="already_have_account">Already have an account?</string>--> <string name="my_orders_title">My Orders</string> <string name="my_orders_subtitle">Go over your pending orders</string> <string name="filters_label">Filter Orders:</string> <string name="sample_customer_name">Emily Davis</string> <string name="sample_price">$21.25</string> <string name="sample_status_pending">Pending</string> <string name="sample_date_time">2025-12-27 | 10:00</string> <string name="from_label">From</string> <string name="to_label">To</string> <string name="sample_pickup_address">555 Maple Dr, North</string> <string name="sample_destination_address">888 Cedar Ln, South</string> <string name="load_image">Load Image</string> <string name="active_delivery_customer_label">Customer Name</string> <string name="active_delivery_separator">|</string> <string name="active_delivery_status_label">Status</string> <string name="active_delivery_pickup_label">Pickup</string> <string name="active_delivery_pickup_time_format">%1$s • %2$s</string> <string name="active_delivery_address_time_label">Address | Time</string> <string name="active_delivery_destination_label">Destination</string> <string name="active_delivery_address_label">Address</string> <string name="active_delivery_location_icon_pickup"></string> <string name="active_delivery_location_icon_destination"></string> <string-array name="customer_order_status_filter_options"> <item>All</item> <item>Pending</item> <item>Accepted</item> <item>In Progress</item> <item>Completed</item> </string-array> <string name="finder_sample_customer_name">Emily Davis</string> <string name="finder_sample_price">$21.25</string> <string name="finder_sample_time">2025-12-27 • 10:00</string> <string name="finder_sample_pickup_address">555 Maple Dr, North</string> <string name="finder_sample_destination_address">888 Cedar Ln, South</string> <string name="delivery_image">Delivery Image</string> <string name="customer_home_title">Welcome back</string> <string name="customer_home_subtitle">Track your orders and create new deliveries.</string> <string name="customer_home_pending">Pending Orders</string> <string name="customer_home_active">Active Orders</string> <string name="customer_home_create_order">Create New Order</string> <string name="customer_home_view_orders">View My Orders</string> <string name="customer_home_greeting">Hi, %1$s</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">TruckBack</string> <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">TruckBack</string> <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string> <string name="delivery_finder_title">Delivery Finder</string> <string name="delivery_finder_subtitle">Tap a marker to view delivery details</string> <string name="my_location">My Location</string> <string name="location_permission_denied_banner">Location access denied. Enable it in Settings to see your position on the map.</string> <string name="dismiss">Dismiss</string> <string name="order_id_format">Order #%1$s</string> <string name="locations_nearby">%1$d locations nearby</string> <string name="zoom_in_for_orders">Zoom in to view individual orders</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
